topics.label: BIOS Boot
topics.description: 512-byte boot sector, MBR, 0x7C00 load address, 0xAA55 signature.

topics.label: Real Mode
topics.description: 16-bit real mode, segment:offset addressing, BIOS interrupts (INT 10h, 13h).

topics.label: Protected Mode
topics.description: Switch to 32-bit protected mode. Set up GDT and enable A20.

topics.label: UEFI
topics.description: Modern firmware interface. UEFI applications with EDK2.
